item.title: Guan Eng wins defamation suit against Zuraida
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
High Court awards RM50,000 in damages to the ex-finance minister over allegations made by his former Cabinet colleague.
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Ex-SRC director says SRC board only approved shareholder resolutions, unaware of RM42m transfer to Najib
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — A former director of SRC International Sdn Bhd told the High Court here today that he had...
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Zizie Izette tells court she was ‘shocked’, but accepted RM2.8m ‘introductory fee’ for setting up agents with late husband Bung Moktar
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — Datin Seri Zizie Izette Abdul Samad today told the High Court she was surprised to receive...
Matched: corruption(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Ex-SRC director Ismee denies knowledge of RM42mil transfer to Najib
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ismee Ismail says he discovered the transactions only after being called by the authorities.
Matched: ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: States to receive more tourism tax revenue, federal funding
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The finance ministry says federal allocations under the Madani government are expected to reach RM10.5 billion this year.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Puteri Wangsa seat belongs to the people, says Amira
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Puteri Wangsa assemblyman says that any party has the right to contest in a democratic system, but the final decision rests with the people.
Matched: parliament(+2), corruption(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Pig heads found outside house, shop in Kuala Pilah and Tampin
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Negeri Sembilan police chief Alzafny Ahmad says the incidents are believed to have stemmed from a personal dispute between the victims and an alleged unlicensed moneylender.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: I never discussed financial matters with Bung, Zizie insists
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Bung Moktar Radin's widow denies ‘concocting a story’ but admits to receiving RM2.8 million as a result of Felcra’s RM150 million unit trust investment.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: PN must stay ‘open’ and show political maturity, says PAS leader
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Iskandar Abdul Samad says leaders must demonstrate magnanimity by putting aside past disputes and conflicts for the nation’s future.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Call it ‘partnership’ instead of Borneo bloc, ex-Sabah CM says
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Salleh Said Keruak says this reflects cooperation and shared responsibility within Malaysia.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Court of Appeal upholds 10-year jail, caning for former temple worker in Perak teen sodomy case
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA, March 5 — The Court of Appeal here today upheld the 10-year jail sentence and two strokes of the cane i...
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Samsuri rules out Muhyiddin as Perikatan’s choice for PM after Bersatu chief casts doubt on his candidacy
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — Perikatan Nasional (PN)chairman Datuk Seri Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar has rebuked Tan Sri Muhyi...
Matched: war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: RM2.8mil was fee for introducing Bung to deal, says widow
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Zizie Izette Abdul Samad denies the money was corrupt payment collected on behalf of Felcra Bhd’s then non-executive chairman, Bung Moktar Radin.
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: RM6.2bil in tax refunds disbursed as at Feb 18
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The finance ministry says RM22.45 billion in tax refunds were paid out in 2025, the highest amount in five years.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Statutory bodies vulnerable to political influence, says think tank
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Institute for Democracy and Economic Affairs's new report says the framework for appointing chairpersons to statutory bodies raises concerns about conflicts of interest.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Wisma Putra working to evacuate Malaysians stranded in Middle East
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The foreign ministry advises those in the affected countries to immediately contact the nearest Malaysian mission or update their details via e-Konsular.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Selangor Sultan backs MACC efforts to strengthen integrity and accountability
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SHAH ALAM, March 5 — The Sultan of Selangor, Sultan Sharafuddin Idris Shah, has expressed support for the Malaysia...
Matched: corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Sabah allocates RM164m for human capital development under 13MP, says CM
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KOTA KINABALU, March 5 — The Sabah government has allocated RM164.01 million for human capital development under t...
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: NSC: Security issues should be kept above politics to protect Malaysia from foreign influence
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — National security issues should not be used as political capital, but resolved through bip...
Matched: inflation(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: KPJ Healthcare opens centre of excellence for advanced neurology, stroke care
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The centre is part of the group’s plan to establish 15 CoEs by 2030, with the first being the Heart & Lung Centre of Excellence at KPJ Johor Specialist Hospital.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Appeals court upholds man’s 10-year sentence for sodomising teen
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
A three-member bench dismisses the appeal by C Logenthiran against his conviction.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Dewan Negara passes Johor Bahru–Singapore RTS Link Bill, no Constitution amendment needed
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — The Johor Bahru-Singapore Rapid Transit System (RTS) Link Bill 2026 does not require amend...
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Kemaman police arrest neighbour after 10-year-old boy injured by air rifle pellet shot, weapons seized
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
CHUKAI, March 5 — A 10-year-old boy was injured after he was hit by a pellet, believed to be fired from a neighbou...
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Lim Guan Eng wins defamation suit against Zuraida, two others in Shah Alam High Court
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SHAH ALAM, March 5 — DAP advisor Lim Guan Eng today won a defamation suit against former Housing and Local Governm...
